svg.title: Growth Journey Calculator — Workflow with Leadership Capabilities
svg.desc: 5 swim lanes: Team Member, Peer, Manager Review Queue, Manager Scoring, Leadership Capabilities
svg.text: Growth Journey Calculator — End-to-End Workflow incl. Leadership Capabilities
Scored from SA onwards. JA/A: observed informally — no formal slider score applied.
How to use leadership scores in 1:1s
Reference a specific observable behaviour — not a general impression. E.g. "Priya ran the AM onboarding
session independently this week — strong Developing Others signal at SA level."
Promotion checklist: leadership score must clear 70% at AM+, with no single capability below 45%.
